case_title: DAPHNE SUSSETTE RIZZO GARRIDO VS. ROGELIO BLANCAS

docket_entries.description: ORDER CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JANUARY 20, 2017 AT 3:30 (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-06-2017 - JUDGMENT.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT BLANCAS, ROGELIO

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-17-2016 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JAN-20-2017 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF DAPHNE SUSSETTE RIZZO GARRIDO. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT ROGELIO BLANCAS. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. PLAINTIFF SERVED DEFENDANT HERSELF. INFORMED SHE NEEDS TO HAVE HER CLAIM SERVED BY A 3RD PARTY. REQUEST SPANISH INTERPRETER FOR DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. LE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-10-2017 - CONTINUED PER STIPULATION OF ALL PARTIES TO JAN-20-2017 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. BOTH PARTIES WERE ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER DANIEL NAVARRO. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J.BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-20-2017 - CONTINUED ON THE COURTS OWN MOTION TO MAR-06-2017 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF DAPHNE SUSSETTE RIZZO GARRIDO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ROGELIO BLANCAS IS PRESENT WITH SPANISH COURT CERTIFIED INTERPRETER DANIEL NAVARRO. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-06-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-06-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT, ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER KENNETH WRIGHT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT, ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER CRISTINA VISUS. DEFENDAND WAIVED SERVICE 1/10/17. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J.BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $173.83 FILED BY GARRIDO, DAPHNE SUSSETTE RIZZO AS TO DEFENDANT BLANCAS, ROGELIO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-17-2016 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GARRIDO, DAPHNE SUSSETTE RIZZO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BLANCAS, ROGELIO $173.83 PRINCIPAL, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $203.83 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
